summary: Phase 3 CRO improvements (iteration 101) tested successfully. Verified: 1) Route-level code splitting with React.lazy() - all lazy-loaded pages (pricing, sample-product-analysis, tools, comparison pages) load correctly without getting stuck on loader. 2) New SeoLandingTemplate improvements - mid-page CTA 'See a sample product report', social proof 'Join 2,000+ UK sellers', EmailCapture component all present on /best-products-to-sell-online-uk, /tiktok-shop-product-research-uk, /shopify-product-research-uk. 3) ComparisonPage improvements - EmailCapture before related links, social proof in CTA section verified on /compare/jungle-scout-vs-trendscout. 4) Scroll depth hook (useScrollDepth) integrated with no React errors during scroll. 5) EmailCapture form submission shows success state ('You are in').

issues: Console 403 errors on some resources (likely external analytics/GTM) - does not affect functionality

passed_tests: /sample-product-analysis lazy-loaded page loads with data-testid elements
/tools lazy-loaded page loads with calculators and EmailCapture
/best-products-to-sell-online-uk has mid-page CTA 'See a sample product report'
/tiktok-shop-product-research-uk has mid-page CTA, social proof, EmailCapture
/shopify-product-research-uk has mid-page CTA, social proof, EmailCapture
EmailCapture form submission shows success state ('You are in')
Navigation between multiple lazy-loaded pages works without breaking
Scroll depth tracking - no React/hook errors on SampleAnalysisPage scroll
Scroll depth tracking - no React/hook errors on ComparisonPage scroll
critical_code_review_comments: Code splitting implemented correctly - LandingPage and NotFoundPage eager-loaded, 80+ pages lazy-loaded with React.lazy()
useScrollDepth hook correctly uses useEffect with scroll event listener and threshold tracking (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)
SCROLL_DEPTH event properly added to analytics.js EVENTS constant
SeoLandingTemplate has mid-page CTA after features grid, EmailCapture before related links, social proof in bottom CTA
ComparisonPage has EmailCapture, social proof text 'Join 2,000+ UK sellers already using TrendScout'
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.backend: N/A - frontend only testing per request

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 CRO improvements fully verified. Key additions tested: 1) Route-level code splitting with React.lazy() for 80+ pages - LandingPage and NotFoundPage are eager-loaded, all others lazy-loaded. 2) useScrollDepth hook in /app/frontend/src/hooks/useScrollDepth.js tracks scroll at 25%, 50%, 75%, 100% thresholds with SCROLL_DEPTH event. 3) SeoLandingTemplate now has mid-page CTA 'See a sample product report', social proof 'Join 2,000+ UK sellers', and EmailCapture component. 4) ComparisonPage has EmailCapture before related links and social proof in CTA. 5) Navigation between lazy-loaded pages works seamlessly. 6) Console 403 errors are external analytics resources (GTM) and don't affect functionality.

seo_landing_template_cro.social_proof: Join 2,000+ UK sellers already using TrendScout

comparison_page_cro.social_proof: Join 2,000+ UK sellers already using TrendScout

email_capture_component.form_submission: Shows success state with 'You are in' message
